title: Analytics - Support App Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when user opens Support > App screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap the menu icon or navigate to the Support section.
3. Tap on the 'App' option within the Support menu to open the Support > App screen.
4. Observe that the app logs an analytics event upon opening the Support > App screen.
5. Wait a few hours, then check Firebase Analytics to view the logged event data (event count, app version, app build, app environment, country, gender, events per session).
expected: The app logs an analytics event when the user opens the Support > App screen, and the event data (event count, app version, app build, app environment, country, gender, events per session) is viewable in Firebase Analytics after a few hours.
